name: MSI Surfaces
note: Reliable quartz and natural-stone programs with fast-turn inventory and familiar builder-friendly colors.

slabs.name: Calacatta Miraggio
slabs.notes: Warm 3cm quartz with softer movement for an upscale marble-look finish

slabs.name: Ivori Taj
slabs.notes: Ivory-toned 3cm quartz with gentle movement that keeps warmer spaces bright

name: Daltile Stone Center
note: A strong natural-stone and quartz stop for grounded neutrals, darker accents, and classic resale-friendly picks.

slabs.name: Absolute Black
slabs.notes: Solid 3cm granite with a clean black finish for sharp contrast and durable everyday use

slabs.name: Fantasy Brown
slabs.notes: 3cm natural stone with flowing taupe and brown movement for warmer, layered kitchens

slabs.name: Kodiak
slabs.notes: Bold 3cm quartz with high contrast patterning for statement islands and modern spaces

name: Quartz America
note: Polished quartz program with bright marble looks, approachable pricing, and dependable everyday colorways.

slabs.name: Calacatta Rio
slabs.notes: 3cm quartz with stronger calacatta movement for a bolder marble-look kitchen

slabs.name: Calacatta Nile

slabs.name: Carrara Classique
slabs.notes: Classic 3cm quartz with carrara-inspired patterning for timeless, lower-drama installs

name: Avani
note: Global slab sourcing with showroom-friendly quartz options that cover soft calacatta, cream, and high-contrast looks.

slabs.name: Crystal Cream (1007)
slabs.notes: Creamy 3cm quartz with a softer field for warm kitchens and quieter perimeter runs

slabs.name: Calacatta Aurus (5035)

slabs.name: Black Mamba (5140)

name: Citi Quartz
note: Quartz-forward supplier with stronger contrast pieces, polished neutrals, and easy-to-present showroom staples.

slabs.notes: Dramatic 3cm quartz with pronounced calacatta veining for higher-impact focal kitchens
